catalog_row.ModelType: Estimated small New Keynesian learning model
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Constant-gain learning; subjective expectations; habit formation; inflation indexation; Taylor rule; natural-rate and cost-push shocks; state-space estimation

status_row.notes: First-pass extraction from MinerU Markdown. Main equations are readable; paper equation 11 has dimensional/OCR ambiguity. Rep-MMB .mod is rational-expectations comparison only and was used solely as implementation_cross_check. Dynare was not run.

validation.check: English derivation has all eight sections and (F1)
English and Chinese F-number counts match
validation.details: English references 73; Chinese references 73; unique equation labels 13.

unresolved_issues: Check the dimensional convention in the subjective multi-step forecast expression.
Future runtime work must implement the learning recursion and state-space matrices rather than only the rational-expectations comparison subset.
Belief and second-moment steady-state details are deferred.
Dynare runtime validation was not performed.
